backend/main.mo: Main actor for the e-commerce backend, defining types and CRUD operations for products, shopping carts, orders, and user profiles, with role-based access control (admin/user) enforced on mutations.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old UserProfile records (name only) to the new format by adding an empty phoneNumber field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the phone-number-only login feature to its implementing files (AuthGuard, LoginButton, ProfileSetup) and associated components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, border, and chart color variables, plus base Tailwind directives.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Shop Central' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, and admin product creation, wrapped in AuthGuard and ProfileSetup.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that presents a phone-number input form (with +91 prefix and validation) for unauthenticated users, stores the phone in sessionStorage, then triggers Internet Identity login before rendering children.
frontend/src/components/CartBadge.tsx: Small badge component that displays the total cart item count as a red pill over the cart icon, hidden when the cart is empty.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart item row component showing product image, name, unit price, a quantity selector, item total, and a remove button, with mutations for updating quantity or removing the item.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, cart icon with badge, admin 'Add Product' link, and login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallerySele: Grid-based image picker component that displays a fixed set of product images and highlights the currently selected one with a checkmark overlay.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header, a router Outlet for page content, and a footer with copyright, store location, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's phone number and a logout button that clears the query cache and session storage on click.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Card component showing a product's image, name, description, price, stock, and delivery type badge, with an 'Add to Cart' button and out-of-stock handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal form shown to newly authenticated users to collect their name and Indian phone number, pre-populating the phone from sessionStorage if available.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: Inline increment/decrement quantity control with configurable min/max bounds and disabled state, built with icon buttons.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Debounced search input that updates the URL search parameter on the home route after 300ms of inactivity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Provides React Query hooks for cart operations including get, add, remove, update quantity, checkout, and order history, each interacting with the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all products, a single product, and creating a new product via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the caller's user profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRole.ts: Provides a React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH colors, imports Google Fonts, and sets up Tailwind base/component/utility layers.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page component that collects and validates a shipping form, displays cart items with totals, and triggers the checkout mutation on submission.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProduct.tsx: Admin-only page for creating a new product with a validated form covering name, description, price, category, image, stock, and delivery type.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays a post-order success page showing the latest order's ID, status, and total, along with a pickup location notice and a button to continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalog.tsx: Renders the main product listing page with a hero banner, search input, category filter buttons, and a responsive grid of ProductCard components.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Shows a single product's image, price, description, stock, and delivery type, with a quantity selector and an add-to-cart button that navigates to the cart on success.
frontend/src/pages/ShoppingCart.tsx: Displays the user's cart items alongside an order summary panel with subtotal, free delivery, and a checkout navigation button.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch/hsl CSS variables, fonts, border radii, shadows, animations) and enabling the animate, typography, and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Shop Central e-commerce app project, including existing features (phone-number login), pending feature requests (product management, admin navigation), and architectural metadata.
